endpoints.name: GET /address/lookup/
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of addresses when supplied with a house number or name and a postcode. It is generally used during customer registration to provide a list of possible addresses from where the customer can select their own address details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WHAPI_API_KEY}} with your WHAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /countries/
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of countries and its currencies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WHAPI_API_KEY}} with your WHAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /countries/{countryCode}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified country and its currency.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WHAPI_API_KEY}} with your WHAPI API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYCODE}} with a real countrycode.

endpoints.name: GET /currencies/
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WHAPI_API_KEY}} with your WHAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /currencies/{currencyCode}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WHAPI_API_KEY}} with your WHAPI API KEY. Replace {{CURRENCYCODE}} with a real currencycode.
